headline: Adobe Buyback And AI Partnerships Reframe Enterprise Growth Opportunity
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) approved a new US$25b share repurchase authorization, running through 2030. The company announced new AI driven marketing partnerships with DICK'S Sporting Goods and Xfinity at its 2026 Summit. Adobe also expanded relationships with Omnicom and IBM to develop vertical specific AI agent solutions for enterprises. Adobe, best known for Creative Cloud and Experience Cloud, is leaning deeper into AI for marketing and content production as large enterprises look to automate...

headline: T-Mobile reportedly in merger talks, Adobe's $25B stock buyback
summary: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including AT&T's (T) wireless subscriber growth, Bloomberg reporting T-Mobile (TMUS) is in talks to merge with Deutsche Telekom (DTE.DE, DTEGY), Adobe (ADBE) announcing a new stock buyback program, and Reuters reporting takeover interests around Inhibrx Biosciences (INBX).

headline: Why Nvidia Is Betting Big on Adobe in the AI Era
summary: AI spending in 2026 is starting to look less like a budget line item and more like a strategic arms race. Companies are no longer asking whether to adopt AI, but who owns the layer where AI actually works. That shift is why investors are watching partnerships more closely than product launches. Against that backdrop, ... Why Nvidia Is Betting Big on Adobe in the AI Era

headline: Best Buy CEO reveals successor amid wave of transition announcements
summary: After Tim Cook announced plans to step down from Apple's (AAPL) chief executive role in September, Best Buy (BBY) CEO Corie Barry revealed her successor as she seeks to step down at the end of October. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into the latest round of CEO transitions and departures at major companies.

content.title: Best Buy CEO reveals successor amid wave of transition announcements
content.description:
After Tim Cook announced plans to step down from Apple's (AAPL) chief executive role in September, Best Buy (BBY) CEO Corie Barry revealed her successor as she seeks to step down at the end of October.

Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into the latest round of CEO transitions and departures at major companies.
content.summary: After Tim Cook announced plans to step down from Apple's (AAPL) chief executive role in September, Best Buy (BBY) CEO Corie Barry revealed her successor as she seeks to step down at the end of October. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into the latest round of CEO transitions and departures at major companies.
